message:
You know that moment when you’re all set for something, and then everything goes right? I had one of those recently. My family and I had spent a weekend putting together our go-bags, filling them with essentials like snacks, water, and copies of important documents. I felt pretty smug about our preparedness, especially when my neighbor popped over to borrow a few batteries. As we chatted, I casually mentioned our little project. 

Suddenly, a storm warning blared on the radio, and my neighbor's eyes widened. "I wish I had thought of that!" she said, looking a bit frazzled. I mean, I didn’t mean to rub it in, but there was a little part of me that thought, "I told you so!" 

In the end, we both felt better knowing we were prepared, and I even shared some tips from this little refresher that helped us get started. 

Have you ever had a moment where your preparedness paid off? I'd love to hear your stories!
